_meta.name: Wolof
_meta.note: Seed file — covers the highest-visibility keys (nav, auth, common actions). Long-tail translations land with TASK-P1-I1d.

common.error: Bënn mbir bu bon am na

unknown.title: Njuumte bu ñu xamul la jot
unknown.description: Jéémaatal léegi. Bu am solo ba mu fa nekk, jokkoo ak ndimbal.

UNAUTHORIZED.title: Sesioŋ bi jeex na
UNAUTHORIZED.description: Duggal waat ngir man a jal.

FORBIDDEN.title: Jëf ji nanguwuñu ko
FORBIDDEN.description: Amoo sañ-sañ bi ngir def jëf ji.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Data yi baaxul
VALIDATION_ERROR.description: Xoolaatal li ngay bind ci formulaire bi.

duplicate_registration.title: Bind ko ba noppi
duplicate_registration.description: Ki bindu na ngir xew-xew bi.

INTERNAL_ERROR.title: Njuumte ci suñu wàll
INTERNAL_ERROR.description: Dafa am njuumte ci suñu wàll. Jéémaatal léegi.

REGISTRATION_CLOSED.title: Bindu bi amul
REGISTRATION_CLOSED.description: Bindu ubbiwul ba tay ci xew-xew bi.

ZONE_FULL.title: Zoon bi fees na
ZONE_FULL.description: Zoon bi jotoon na sa xayma. Joxal participant bi beneen zoon walla xaar.

ORGANIZATION_PLAN_LIMIT.title: Xayma bu plan bi jotoon na

preferences.title: Yëglekaay
preferences.subtitle: Tànnal yëglekaay yi ngay bëgg jot. Yëglekaay yu aju ci kaaraange walla fayoo, manuñu leen tëj.
preferences.emptyDescription: Dellul ci kanam, catalog bi dina dox.
preferences.mandatorySrHint: Yëglekaay bi fàww, manuñu ko tëj
preferences.pushDisabledTooltip: Taxawal push notifications ci kaw, laaj ji dinga ko jariñoo.
preferences.unsavedCount: {count, plural, one {# soppi bu ñu dencagul} other {# soppi yu ñu dencagul}}
preferences.pauseAllMarketingDescription: Tëj na yépp yëglekaay marketing yi ci benn click. Man nga leen ubbi ko ci kenn-kenn ci suuf.
preferences.pageHeaderDescription: Tànnal canal bu yëglekaay bu ne — imeyl, app, push, SMS. Yëglekaay yu kaaraange ak fay, manuñu leen tëj.
preferences.quietHoursDescription: Yëglekaay yu urgentul duñu dem ci bii waxtu, dinañu leen yónnee ci ginnaaw. Yëglekaay yu fàww mën a dem buñu ñëwee.
preferences.quietHoursTooltip: Waxtu yi, ci fuseau bu yaw lañuy xelu.
preferences.categoriesDescription: Inter mu mag ci ñaari waaso wu imeyl. Ànd ak toggle yu ci suuf yi.
preferences.perKeyDescription: Bennu inter ci canal bu ne ci yëglekaay bu ne.
preferences.testSendAria: Yónnee aperçu bu {name} ci sama imeyl
preferences.testSendMandatoryTooltip: Yëglekaay yu fàww manuñu leen tester ci bii page.
preferences.testSendSuccess: Yëglekaay yónnee nañu ko ci sa boîte.
preferences.testSendRateLimited: Yegg nga limit bu test (5/waxtu). Jéémaatal ginnaaw.
preferences.testSendNotOptable: Yëglekaay bii dafa fàww, manuñu ko tester.

categories.authDescription: Dugg, vérifications imeyl ak soppi baatu-ruus.
categories.transactionalDescription: Bindu, badge ak dëggal ci sa xew-xew yi.
categories.billingDescription: Fay, reçu ak abonnement. Yëglekaay yii fàww nañu.
categories.organizationalDescription: Invitation équipe, soppi ci rôle ak jëf yu organisation.
categories.marketingDescription: Yu bees, conseil ak promo. Man nga génn bu ne.

notifications.title: Yëglekaay yu plateforme
notifications.subtitle: Ubbi, tëj, te soppi canal yi ci yëglekaay yu sistëm. Soppi yi, ñu ngi leen audité.

drawer.title: Soppi yëglekaay bi
drawer.subtitle: Soppil canal yi ak sujet imeyl bi.
drawer.channelsHelp: Tànn benn canal ci yu code bi tàmbali.
drawer.subjectHelp: Bàyyi feem ngir jëfandikoo sujet bu template bi.

meta.mandatoryHint: Yëglekaay bu fàww — jëfandikukat yi manuñu génn.

delivery.title: Gisal yëglekaay
delivery.subtitle: Xoolal livraison, ubbi ak suppression yi ci platfoorm bi.
delivery.emptyChart: Amul xeeti jëf ci fenêtre bi.
